summary: Verified fix for duplicate X close buttons on mobile drawers. StokedDrawer and BlueLiveIcon drawer both show exactly 1 X close button as expected.
critical_code_review_comments: sheet.jsx: hideCloseButton prop correctly implemented (lines 46-56) - conditionally renders default X button
StokedDrawer.js: Uses hideCloseButton=true AND has custom X button - shows 1 X button ✅
ExclusiveAreaDrawer.js: Uses hideCloseButton=true AND has custom X button - code review confirms correct implementation
BlueLiveIcon.js: Does NOT use hideCloseButton, relies on default close button - shows 1 X button ✅
OnDemandDutyIcon.js: Does NOT use hideCloseButton, relies on default close button - correct implementation
SurferSessionHub.js: Does NOT use hideCloseButton, relies on default close button - correct implementation
PersonaMaskBanner.js: Does NOT use hideCloseButton, relies on default close button - correct implementation
PhotographerDirectory.js: Uses Sheet but doesn't have custom X, relies on default - correct implementation
context_for_next_testing_agent: Duplicate X close button fix verified. The fix adds hideCloseButton prop to SheetContent component. Drawers with custom X buttons (StokedDrawer, ExclusiveAreaDrawer) use hideCloseButton=true. Drawers without custom X buttons (BlueLiveIcon, OnDemandDutyIcon, SurferSessionHub, PersonaMaskBanner) use the default close button.

stoked_drawer_x_button.details: StokedDrawer shows exactly 1 X close button on mobile (custom X button, default hidden via hideCloseButton)

blue_live_icon_drawer_x_button.details: BlueLiveIcon drawer shows exactly 1 X close button on mobile (default close button from SheetContent)

exclusive_area_drawer_x_button.details: ExclusiveAreaDrawer uses hideCloseButton=true and has custom X button - code review confirms correct implementation (could not test due to Grom parent approval requirement)
